title: Exploration Context Schema
description: Code exploration results from cli-explore-agent for task context gathering

project_structure.description: Overall architecture description: module organization, layer structure, component relationships

path.description: File path relative to project root

rationale.description: Brief explanation of why this file is relevant from this exploration angle

relevant_files.description: File paths to be modified or referenced for the task. Prefer object format with relevance scores for synthesis prioritization.

patterns.description: Existing code patterns, conventions, and styles found in the codebase

dependencies.description: External and internal module dependencies relevant to the task

integration_points.description: Where this task connects with existing code: APIs, hooks, events, shared state

constraints.description: Technical constraints and limitations affecting implementation

question.description: The clarification question to ask user

context.description: Background context explaining why this clarification is needed

options.description: Available options for user to choose from (2-4 options)

recommended.description: Zero-based index of recommended option in the options array. Based on codebase patterns and best practices analysis.

clarification_needs.description: Ambiguities requiring user input before planning

task_description.description: Original task description that triggered exploration

exploration_index.description: Exploration index (1-4) in parallel exploration set
